sections.paragraph:
verb לעבור

to pass, cross; elapse; go through; be over, end; commit a felony, transgress, sin; overtake, exceed

verb להיעבר

be crossed, passed; sinned, transgressed

verb עובר (>>עֻבַּר)

be made pregnant; changed (shape); intercalated

verb להתעבר

become pregnant; be intercalated

verb להעביר

to pass; transfer; transport, move; take across; remove, take away; pardon, cancel; accept, judge as acceptable

verb הועבר

be passed; transferred; transported, moved; taken across; be removed, taken away; canceled

verb לעבר (>>עיבר)

to impregnate, make pregnant; intercalate

masculine noun

past, past tense, record

masculine noun

side; the opposite side, the region beyond
